ddls:
CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "claimant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claimant (person filing the claim) */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Unique case number assigned to the claim */,
  "date_of_incident" TEXT /* Date of the incident that caused the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury sustained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim (e.g., open, in review, settled) */,
  "total_medical_expenses" REAL /* Total medical expenses incurred due to the injury */,
  "medical_multiplier" REAL /* Multiplier applied to medical expenses to calculate the injury claim value */,
  "income_lost" REAL /* Total income lost due to the injury */,
  "income_multiplier" REAL /* Multiplier applied to lost income to calculate the injury claim value */,
  "value_of_injury_claim" REAL /* Calculated value of the injury claim */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of the claim (e.g., car accident, slip and fall) */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Location where the incident occurred */,
  "police_report_number" TEXT /* Police report number if applicable */,
  "witnesses" TEXT /* List of witnesses to the incident */,
  "attorney_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned attorney */,
  "insurer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance company */,
  "date_of_filing" TEXT /* Date the claim was filed */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was settled */,
  "settlement_amount" REAL /* Final settlement amount */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_insurer_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_attorney_id FOREIGN KEY ("attorney_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_claimant_id FOREIGN KEY ("claimant_id") REFERENCES claimants ("claimant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claimants" (
  "claimant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claimant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the claimant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the claimant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the claimant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the claimant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the claimant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the claimant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the claimant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the claimant */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "legal_representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legal representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claimant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claimants_legal_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("legal_representative_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical expense */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim the expense is associated with */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date of the medical expense */,
  "expense_description" TEXT /* Description of the medical expense */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the medical expense */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Healthcare provider who incurred the expense */,
  "bill_number" TEXT /* Bill number for the medical expense */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was issued */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the expense (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_expenses_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_records" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim the income record is associated with */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the income loss period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the income loss period */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the income loss */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of income lost during the period */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "employer_address" TEXT /* Address of the employer */,
  "employer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employer */,
  "verification_document" TEXT /* File path of the verification document (e.g., pay stubs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_records_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., lawyer, paralegal, insurance adjuster, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the claim */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the claim was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the claim (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_access_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legal_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal document */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim the document is associated with */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the legal document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the legal document (e.g., lawsuit, settlement agreement) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the document (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legal_documents_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legal_documents_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)
